title: Borderline Travel Holdal, Travel Bag for Luggage Gym Sports, Short Trips, Adjustable Shoulder Strap, Lightweight Travel Bag (Blue)
features: CABIN APPROVED MOST MAJOR AIRLINES - This lightweight carry on is cabin approved for most major airlines premium paid customers.

TRAVEL HOLDALL - Made from high quality polyester twill this bag is a must have for your next holiday or weekend break. The lightweight material and large interior space allows you to take even more clothes and essentials with your on your next break.
SPORTS DUFFLE BAG - With so many uses you will never need another bag again. This large duffle bag is perfect for use as a travel holdall, Carry on bag, Sports Bag, Gym Bag or everyday use holdall.

WEEKEND BAG - This bag has strong polyester handles allowing you to carry this bag with ease and comfort. The additional side zipped pocket is perfect for keeping those valuables like wallets, purses or keys
LUGGAGE BAGS - This bag is a must for your next holiday. With three colours to choose from you will find the exact colour to fit your style.
description: Travel Holdall 40cm Travel Bag for Luggage Gym Sports, Lightweight Travel Bag, Durable travel bag to make weekends away easier with adjustable shoulder strap Key features: -Super lightweight -Large main zip compartment -Two side zip pockets - Front zip compartment - Adjustable shoulder strap Dimensions: 45 x 25 x 20cm Capacity: 24.3L Weight: 1.5lbs Strap Length: 59cm
